page: The Microsoft Azure M416-208s_v2 is an x86_64 architecture server from the MSv2 family, powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8280L processors. It features 104 physical cores and 208 vCPUs running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with a massive 5700.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 27.4 GB of RAM per physical core. Additionally, it includes 8389 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark data reveals a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. While single-core performance is modest, ranking in the bottom 25% for stress-ng and gzip compression, the server excels in highly parallelized tasks. Multi-core stress-ng performance, Passmark CPU score, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression all rank in the top 10%. Memory subsystem performance is exceptionally strong, with both small-block cached and large-block uncached read/write memory bandwidth reaching top-tier levels. Redis SET operations also achieve top-tier throughput at 162.62 million operations per second.

The primary tradeoff of this instance is its lower single-threaded execution speed, making it less suitable for workloads that cannot exploit its massive core count. However, its extreme memory density and massive local storage capacity provide high qualitative cost efficiency for enterprise resource consolidation. This server is highly optimized for memory-intensive and data-heavy workloads, such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise relational databases, big data analytics, and high-throughput web serving.
description: The Microsoft Azure M416-208s_v2 is a memory-optimized server from the MSv2 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8280L processor with 104 physical cores and 208 vCPUs. It features an exceptional 5700.0 GB of RAM and 8389 GB of local storage. While single-core benchmarks place it in the lower percentiles, its multi-core performance and memory bandwidth are in the top 10% tier, as demonstrated by outstanding stress-ng multi-core and Redis SET operation results. This server is designed for massive scale, offering high resource density that makes it qualitatively cost-effective for large enterprise consolidations. It is best suited for large-scale in-memory databases, heavy relational database management systems, and intensive multi-threaded enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416-208s_v2 is a memory-optimized server featuring 208 vCPUs, 5.7 TB of RAM, and 8.3 TB of local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and memory bandwidth performance for enterprise databases.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M416-208s_v2 is a memory-optimized server with 208 vCPUs, 5.7 TB RAM, and 8.3 TB storage, built for large enterprise databases.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform featuring massive RAM and local storage for parallelized enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8280L processor with 104 physical cores and 208 vCPUs
Massive 5700.0 GB of system memory providing 27.4 GB per core
Bundled 8389 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise workloads
